class Order:
    def __init__(self, order_id: int, items: list[dict]):
        self.order_id = order_id
        self.items = items
        self.status = "pending"
        self.total = 0.0

    def calculate_total(self) -> float:
        return sum(item["price"] * item["quantity"] for item in self.items)


class InventoryManager:
    def __init__(self, stock: dict[str, int]):
        self.stock = stock

    def check_availability(self, items: list[dict]) -> bool:
        for item in items:
            if self.stock.get(item["sku"], 0) < item["quantity"]:
                return False
        return True

    def reserve_items(self, items: list[dict]) -> None:
        for item in items:
            self.stock[item["sku"]] -= item["quantity"]


class UserAccount:
    def __init__(self, username: str, balance: float):
        self.username = username
        self.balance = balance

    def debit(self, amount: float) -> None:
        self.balance -= amount

    def credit(self, amount: float) -> None:
        self.balance += amount


def transfer_funds(sender: UserAccount, receiver: UserAccount, amount: float) -> None:
    sender.debit(amount)
    receiver.credit(amount)
